title: Add column to users table
input: add a 'phone' column of type VARCHAR(20) to the users table. it should be nullable and have a unique index. update the user creation query to include it.

requiredConstraints: add a 'phone' column of type VARCHAR(20) to the users table. it should be nullable and have a unique index. update the user creation query to include it.
forbiddenAdditions: Do not add new storage systems or background jobs while addressing “Add column to users table”.
